title: Geomorphology

prerequisites.text: Acceptance for Honours or Master's specialising in EGS.

outline: The course introduces students to the theory of geomorphological systems and applies this to an area or topic of the student's choice, particularly targeting Honours students who have selected physical geography topics for their dissertation. Students are expected to interpret landscapes, identify formative processes and events, examine environmental changes at different spatial and temporal scales, and place their area of study into geological, Quaternary, climatic and applied contexts, appreciating geomorphological concepts such as systems approach, complexity, relationships, feedbacks, thresholds, equilibrium and cycles.
dp_requirements: At least 80% attendance record and submission of all assignments.
